/usr/bin/mpicxx CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/test/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/1form_assemble_matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/2form_assemble_matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/evaluation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/lifecycle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/linearsolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/output.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/setup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DUAL_MAC_TEST.dir/src/time_evolve.cpp.o -o DUAL_MAC_TEST  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/petsc/arch-linux-c-debug/lib /opt/petsc/arch-linux-c-debug/lib/libpetsc.so
